text:
Not every AI thinks the same way.

On our last Tech Thursday, one of our builders put it perfectly: Claude feels like the Ivy League — polished, thorough, a little bougie. ChatGPT feels like it's for the people — quick, direct, no research paper required.

Now Apple's letting you pick your own on iPhone. The real question isn't which one is smartest. It's which one fits how YOU build.

Follow @layer8culture if you're building with AI.

Documentary realism, shallow depth of field, electric blue and deep navy palette with a warm gold accent on the second doorway, ambient hum and soft footstep audio, no text, no logos, no copyrighted references.
